component.name: EPUB Translator
EPUB 翻译器
component.summary: Translate EPUB books using local AI models
使用本地 AI 模型翻译 EPUB 电子书

description.p: A fully offline EPUB translator that runs completely on your local machine. Supports both text-based and scanned/image-based EPUB files using OCR.

Features: - Text direct translation for standard EPUBs - OCR + translation for scanned/image-based EPUBs - Checkpoint/resume support — never lose progress - Real-time hardware resource monitoring (CPU, RAM) - Native GNOME desktop interface
GNOME desktop application with GTK4 + Libadwaita. RPM packaging for Fedora.
